manual_review_summary: Scanner flagged curl|bash pattern in CI but review confirms it is downloading from trusted CDN with integrity checksum. Credential reads in initialization code are benign (reading non-secret env config). However, SKILL.md documentation is vague about error-handling for malformed inputs. Recommend clarifying input validation contract before production use.
conditions_if_conditional: 1) SKILL.md must document explicit input validation contract. 2) Maintainer must commit to code review before any changes to shell invocation code. 3) Recommend pinning dependencies and using SRI hashes.
